summary: Employee 1095-C download feature verified. New endpoint GET /api/enrollment/employee/my-1095c/pdf works correctly. David Chen (employee with declined coverage but was offered) can download his 1095-C form. Employee Portal shows 'Coverage Declined' status AND the Form 1095-C download card together. Download button has data-testid='download-1095c-btn'. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: employee_name field is empty/null in forms response, but forms are correctly generated with proper offer codes

issues: 1095-C FORMS card shows '47 employees offered coverage' which may be confusing - this is MEC tracking count, not actual 1095-C forms count. The GENERATED card correctly shows '1 + 2' (1094-C + 1095-C)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/irs-forms/1095c/{employer_id}/2026 returns 2 forms with non-1H offer codes
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/eligibility/{employer_id} shows 2 employees with non-1H codes (David Chen, Chase Cooper)
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/employee/my-1095c/pdf returns valid PDF (200, application/pdf)
Backend: GET /api/enrollment/employee/my-plans shows enrollment status for David Chen
Backend: Employer cannot use employee 1095-C endpoint (400/404)
Frontend: Employee Portal loads with 'Coverage Declined' status badge
Frontend: Decline info card shows 'Coverage Declined' with 'Spouse Coverage' reason
Frontend: Form 1095-C card present with download button
Frontend: PDF download works - file saved as '1095-C_David_chen_2026.pdf'
Frontend: Success toast 'Form 1095-C downloaded' appears after download
critical_code_review_comments: New endpoint GET /api/enrollment/employee/my-1095c/pdf correctly checks eligibility and enrollment records before generating PDF
Endpoint returns 400 if offer_code is 1H (no coverage offered)
Frontend download1095c function correctly handles blob response and triggers download
data-testid='download-1095c-btn' correctly added to download button
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing employee David Chen with declined enrollment.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee 1095-C download feature verified. Key points: (1) New endpoint GET /api/enrollment/employee/my-1095c/pdf generates PDF for employees with non-1H offer codes. (2) David Chen has offer_code 1B and declined enrollment - can download 1095-C. (3) Employee Portal shows both 'Coverage Declined' status AND Form 1095-C download card. (4) Download button has data-testid='download-1095c-btn'. (5) 2 employees have non-1H codes: David Chen and Chase Cooper.

verified_features.employee_1095c_download: Employees with coverage offers (even if declined) can download their 1095-C form
verified_features.employee_portal_ui: Form 1095-C card with download button shown alongside enrollment status
verified_features.data_testid: download-1095c-btn correctly added to download button
verified_features.pdf_generation: Valid PDF generated with correct filename format: 1095-C_{name}_{year}.pdf
